title: Express Middleware, Promise Errors, Dependencies, and Response Ownership · Type-System Trace: Error Middleware Headers Sent
summary: Middleware runs in an unsafe order, async rejections are wrapped twice, error handlers use the wrong signature, dependencies are created per request, and multiple layers write responses. Planned artifact: Add and verify the httpsts error middleware headers sent increment in composed middleware, dependency, and error boundary. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement four-argument error middleware, normalized failure taxonomy, disclosure policy, and headersSent delegation without double writes.
Use Express 5 automatic Promise rejection forwarding while preserving causal error identity and avoiding duplicate next calls.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
